purpose: Provide a fail-closed, read-only readiness inspection before any staging execute or rehearse action by verifying immutable release identity, protected environment configuration, Cloudflare staging-host prerequisites, database prerequisites, route mounts, provider health, canonical safe controls, migration tooling, and the absence of publication or live-customer capability.
release_identity_checks: requested release commit is a lowercase 40-character SHA
checked-out source commit matches the requested commit
configured runtime release ID matches the requested release
configured runtime release commit matches the requested commit
protected_environment_checks: all required protected values are present
operations, integration, rehearsal, rehearsal-adapter, runtime-control, Admin, and provider credentials are at least 32 characters
runtime origin and protected endpoints use HTTPS
protected endpoints belong to the staging runtime origin
Cloudflare account ID and least-privilege API token are configured
staging upstream service name ends in -staging
four provider health endpoints use HTTPS
required alert channels are configured through HTTPS

pre_execution_warnings: migration ledger is not yet available
one or more migrations 001 through 011 are not yet applied
database_checks.post_execution_requirement: The execute and rehearse actions continue to require all migrations to be reconciled through the SHA-256 ledger.

tooling_checks: Node.js major version is at least 22
Wrangler staging config generator is present
staging host deployment workflow is present

ordering_contract.pre_migration_gate: Local protected-environment readiness must pass before migrations.
ordering_contract.post_bootstrap_gate: Full runtime readiness, migration, control, and heartbeat evidence is enforced after migrations, release registration, safe-state bootstrap, and provider-heartbeat refresh.

release_gates: The local protected-environment inspection returns ready with zero blockers.
The Cloudflare account, Hyperdrive binding, staging upstream service, Worker secrets, and provider health endpoints are configured.
The protected runtime inspection returns ready with zero blockers after bootstrap.
The requested release and configured runtime are bound to the same exact commit.
PostgreSQL and pgcrypto are reachable before execute.
All required routes, credentials, alert channels, provider heartbeats, and safe controls pass.
The customer rollout is paused at zero percent.
The report confirms publicationAllowed=false and liveCustomerDataAllowed=false.
Only after post-bootstrap readiness passes may the staging rehearsal execute.
non_actions: does not expose a customer cohort
does not publish the subscription product

integration_sequence.previous_component: Staging integration execution runtime and evidence control
integration_sequence.current_component: Staging readiness inspector with Cloudflare host prerequisites
integration_sequence.next_component: Deploy the isolated staging upstream and host, then execute the first exact-release integration and rehearsal
